title: Biden says spy balloon won’t hurt Xi relations — draws rebuke from China
description: President Biden said he doesn't  think relations with China will be negatively affected by the Chinese spy balloon that traversed much of the United States mai...
keywords: News, china, congress, joe biden, spying, xi jinping
snippet:
Tensions? What tensions?

President Biden said he doesn’t think relations with China will be negatively affected by his having to shoot down a Chinese balloon...
